series_metadata.series_title: Targeted Case Management (TCM) for DODD Compliance
series_metadata.series_description: Documentation to include reports on physical inspection of records and sites where services are provided: documented interviews with administrators, recipients and providers; service verification, medical necessity claims verification, all other records related to the administration/provision of TCM Services (Department of Development Disabilities).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office, 4 years in records center
